# models-as-a-service

> models-as-a-service is a Kubernetes component. deploying 4 workload(s) (maas-api, payload-processing, maas-api, maas-controller) with 4 container(s). watching 8 resource type(s). exposing 3 service(s) on ports: 0, 8080, 8443, 9004, 9090. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 8080. protected by 6 network policy/policies. runtime dependencies: PostgreSQL, kubernetes. exposing 5 Prometheus metrics. with 2 ingress route(s). integrates with management relationship via labels/annotations. references components: kserve (import, provider).
